title: fagara tenuifolia
intro: Fagara tenuifolia, also known as Zanthoxylum bungeanum, is a species of flowering plant in the rutaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fagara tenuifolia include relief from pain and fever, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be combined with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
